expectations.text: Uses correct MCP imports: MCPServerStreamableHTTP and MCPServerStdio from pydantic_ai.mcp
expectations.evidence: Line 6: Uses MCPServerHTTP which is deprecated (should be MCPServerStreamableHTTP). Pyright: 'The class MCPServerHTTP is deprecated, use MCPServerSSE instead.'
Line 11: Uses MCPServerHTTP(url=...) — deprecated class. Also uses keyword 'url=' instead of positional arg.

expectations.text: MCPServerStdio instantiated with python command and ./tools/calculator.py in args
Both servers use tool_prefix parameter to avoid name collisions
Uses async with agent: context manager for proper lifecycle management
expectations.evidence: Line 29: Uses deprecated 'async with agent.run_mcp_servers()' instead of 'async with agent:'. Pyright: 'run_mcp_servers is deprecated'.

expectations.text: Servers passed via toolsets=[...] parameter (not tools=)
expectations.evidence: Line 25: Uses 'mcp_servers=[...]' which is deprecated. Should be 'toolsets=[...]'. Pyright: 'mcp_servers is deprecated, use toolsets instead'.
